text.title: Kubernetes Canary and Progressive Delivery Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply `Kubernetes Canary and Progressive Delivery` end-to-end. Each step has an input, an action, an output, and (where relevant) a decision gate.

step.name: pick-engine
step.action: Choose Argo Rollouts vs Flagger; install in cluster.

step.name: analysis-template
step.action: Write AnalysisTemplate with success/failure conditions; version it.

step.name: rollout-spec
step.action: Define weight steps (>= 3) with pause + analysis hook; set rollback_seconds.

step.name: promote-once
step.action: Trigger first canary; observe analysis; verify auto-rollback works via injected failure.
